phrases.intent_en: Ask if the tower is open to climb
phrases.text_local: La tour est-elle ouverte pour monter ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah TOOR eh-tel oo-VAIRT poor mon-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral tower offers panoramic views of Lausanne, Lake Geneva, and the Alps. Climbing access varies by season.

responses.english: Yes, but check the hours at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: wee, may vay-ree-fee-AY layz oh-REHR ah lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Oui, mais vérifiez les horaires à l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry to the cathedral is free
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the cathedral nave is free. The tower climb may have a small fee.

responses.english: Yes, entry to the cathedral is free. The tower costs extra.
responses.phonetic: wee, lahn-TRAY duh lah kah-tay-DRAL eh grah-TWEET. lah TOOR eh pay-AHNT
responses.local: Oui, l'entrée de la cathédrale est gratuite. La tour est payante.

phrases.cultural_note: Visitors can climb the cathedral tower for panoramic views of Lausanne, Lake Geneva, and the Alps. The climb involves 150+ steps.

responses.english: Yes, there are over 150 steps. The view is magnificent.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah ploo duh sahn sank-AHNT MARSH. lah vyoo eh mah-nyee-FEEK
responses.local: Oui, il y a plus de cent cinquante marches. La vue est magnifique.

phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les heures de visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay zuhr duh vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral has regular visiting hours but may close during services.

responses.phonetic: duh set uhr ah dee-nuhf uhr. fair-MAY pahn-DAHN lay zoh-FEES
responses.local: De sept heures à dix-neuf heures. Fermé pendant les offices.

phrases.cultural_note: Photography is allowed in the cathedral but flash is not permitted.
